steps.title: Use the Round Table timeline
steps.content: The passage says no source before 1155 includes references to the Round Table. Preiddeu Annwfn was composed around 900, so it could not contain Round Table information. Malory's later work may include the Round Table, but that specific detail cannot come from a pre-1155 source.

steps.title: Reject unsupported inferences
steps.content: Choice A makes an accuracy claim and relies on the timing of the Mabinogion, not the Round Table evidence. Choice C says Round Table sources were available to Geoffrey, contrary to the timeline. Choice D compares overall content similarity, which the passage never addresses. The answer is B.
